messages.content: In professional sports, athletes pushing their limits is expected. Performance enhancers don't level the playing field; they separate stars. If some are pushed up to play in higher calibre games because of enhancements, then shouldn’t that be applauded instead of held back? Competition evolves, and rules have to follow, even if it means tougher conditions.
